message:
[review-fix] Replace panic! with assert!+let-else in any/all live tests

ubs flagged 6 critical panic!() invocations in the bool-payload guard
of live_oracle_series_{any,all}_* tests added in 4a7ed0b. Convert to
the assert!(matches!(...)) + let-else pattern used by the other
tests in the same file. Behavior unchanged; tests still passing.

[bd-frankenpandas-7mvy8]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
